news.title: Pixi’s new iOS app turns text messages into interactive AR experiences
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] Forget stickers, GIFs, and emoji reactions. Pixi is betting that the next evolution of messaging is interactive augmented reality (AR).

news.title: How to turn off AI in your Google Docs
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] Here's what you need to do to get those pesky "write with Gemini" pop-ups to go away.

news.title: EU cybersecurity agency to meet Anthropic on Thursday, EU Commission says
news.description: [THE STAR] BRUSSELS, ⁠June 17 (Reuters) - The ⁠European cybersecurity agency ‌Enisa will hold a meeting with U.S. ​artificial intelligence ⁠company Anthropic ⁠on Thursday in San ⁠Francisco, ‌a European Commission ⁠spokesperson told reporters on ​Wednesday.

news.title: ECB's Lagarde says AI could trigger financial crises and calls for Cold War-style non-proliferation governance
news.description: [TNW] Lagarde warned that financial crises, not technology, are what destroy jobs and savings. She wants AI governance modelled on nuclear non-proliferation treaties.

news.title: Psychologists shouldn't replace thinking with AI, researchers warn
news.description: [MEDICAL XPRESS] For some psychologists, it's becoming more common to use AI systems to replace human thinking in research. That's a very risky choice based on misconceptions, warn Iris van Rooij and Olivia Guest in a new paper published today in Current Directions...

news.title: Brokerage sees AI supply chain as winner in truce
news.description: [BANGKOK POST] The artificial intelligence (AI) supply chain is one of the most attractive investment themes should a potential peace agreement between the US and Iran materialise, says Finnomena Funds, noting it could be a catalyst for a global market rally.

news.title: EU cybersecurity agency to meet Anthropic on Thursday, EU Commission says
news.description: [REUTERS] The European cybersecurity ​agency Enisa will ‌hold a meeting with U.S. ​artificial intelligence ​company Anthropic on Thursday ⁠in San ​Francisco, a European ​Commission spokesperson told reporters on Wednesday.

news.title: Microsoft’s China AI Business Grows on OpenAI Model Sales
news.description: [BLOOMBERG] Microsoft Corp. has built a big business selling AI models to Chinese companies despite the growing rivalry between the US and China over artificial intelligence.

news.title: China pitches free AI for the developing world as the G7 debates who gets access to American models
news.description: [TNW] China's top diplomat called for a global AI cooperation org as the G7 discussed "trusted partner" access to US models. Two visions for AI governance are diverging.

news.title: AI vital signs system outperforms fixed-threshold ICU monitoring
news.description: [MEDICAL XPRESS] Researchers have developed an artificial intelligence-based patient monitoring system they say can identify signs of clinical deterioration earlier and more accurately than existing approaches. The system could help hospital staff intervene before a...

news.title: Jeff Bezos backs AI materials startup CuspAI in $400M round at $2.6 billion valuation
news.description: [TECHSTARTUPS.COM] CuspAI, a UK startup using artificial intelligence to discover new materials, is reportedly raising $400 million in funding at a $2.6 billion valuation, according to the Financial Times. The round includes participation from Jeff Bezos' family...

news.title: Bernie Sanders unveils plan to give the public direct ownership of AI companies
news.description: [JAPAN TODAY] As artificial intelligence companies reshape the economy and race toward trillion-dollar valuations, Sen. Bernie Sanders is proposing a sweeping transfer of wealth and power from the industry to the American public. The legislation, shown first to...

news.title: Roelof Botha joins SpaceX’s board of directors
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] The former Sequoia Capital leader is filling an "existing vacancy" on SpaceX's board, days after the company went public in the largest IPO ever.

news.title: After unveiling ridiculously expensive AR glasses, Snap’s stock takes a dive
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] Snap's long-awaited smart glasses debut hasn't exactly done wonders for the company's stock.

news.title: NEA’s Tiffany Luck says enterprises are still figuring out their AI ROI
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] Tokenmaxxing was the hottest trend in Silicon Valley earlier this year, with CEOs encouraging employees to push AI usage as far as it would go. Then the bill came due. Uber reportedly blew through its annual AI budget...

news.title: World leaders want American AI. They just don’t want America to be able to turn it off.
news.description: [TECHCRUNCH] French President Macron and Indian PM Modi raised alarms at the G7 summit that the U.S. could cut off access to American AI overnight — a fear the Anthropic blackout just made real.
